message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.melt (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.melt:

- melt_basic: 2-row 3-col frame, melt 2 value columns into long
  format (id, variable, value)
- melt_with_var_value_names: same shape, custom var_name="metric"
  and value_name="score"

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.melt(id_vars, value_vars, var_name, value_name)), runs the
Rust DataFrame.melt(&id_vars, &value_vars, var, val), and asserts
parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameMelt was already
wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-qh3k0]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
